decoded.explanation: The defendant is a first-time offender who committed a non-violent financial crime. While embezzlement is a serious breach of trust, the relatively modest amount of $25,000, the lack of prior criminal history, and the proactive effort to make restitution through partial repayment warrant a lenient sentence closer to the lower end of the sentencing guidelines. A period of six months incarceration serves as a sufficient deterrent while allowing the defendant to focus on full restitution and rehabilitation.
